trans-unit.source: To use this feature, your API token needs the "%s" scope. You can request a new token with the required scope through the OAuth flow.
Your user group needs the "%s" permission to use this tool. Please contact your administrator to enable it.
This action requires approximately %d credits. You currently have %d credits available. Top up your credits in the AI Suite Dashboard.
The AI model "%s" is not available for your user group. Available models: %s
Page %d is outside your accessible page tree. You can work with pages in your assigned web mounts.
The AI Suite Server is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a few moments. Read-only tools (page tree, content, audit) continue to work.
The changes could not be saved. This may be due to missing write permissions on the target page. Details: %s
Please check the input: %s
You've used %d credits in this session — great productivity! Your session budget of %d credits has been reached. Start a new session or contact your administrator for a higher budget.
Running "%s" failed unexpectedly. Repeating the identical call will fail again. Re-check the arguments against the tool schema; if they are correct, this needs an administrator.
Page %d has been excluded from AI processing by its administrator. This page's content will not be sent to AI providers.
You do not have permission to access page %d.
You do not have permission to access record %s:%d.
You do not have permission to access file UID %d.
You do not have permission to access folder "%s".
You do not have permission to use language UID %d.
No backend user context available.
Backend user has no access to workspace %d. Contact a TYPO3 administrator or adjust the MCP write mode.
Token is bound to workspace %d, but the backend user no longer has access to it. Generate a new MCP token via the AI Suite backend module.
SEO metadata successfully updated for page %d.
Translation for page %d (%s) successfully created.
Mass action started for %d pages. Task ID: %s. You can check the progress anytime.
%d of %d items successfully processed. %d items need manual review.
Changes saved to workspace %d. They are ready for review and can be published when approved.
Content guidelines for page %d successfully created. They will automatically apply to all AI operations on this page.
